posts.name: Massimiliano Galli
posts.cooked_html:
Dear analysers,

To help us understand which aspects of Combine development to prioritise in the near future, the Combine dev team has prepared a survey with questions about technical aspects and general user experience. If you would like to share your thoughts and help shape the future of the tool, please complete the survey at this link [1] by December 20th.

Best,

the Combine dev team

[1] https://forms.gle/FDFnLp8DiwTsGAxT6
